# Miglustat 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Miglustat 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Miglustat</strong> 目前有 <strong>18 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Miglustat 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Opfolda (miglustat) is an enzyme stabiliser of cipaglucosidase alfa long-term enzyme replacement therapy in adults with late-onset Pompe disease (acid ?- glucosidase [GAA] deficiency).</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>Gaucher disease（99.9%）</li>
<li>autosomal ichthyosis syndrome with fatal disease course（99.8%）</li>
<li>cholesteryl ester storage disease（99.8%）</li>
<li>Krabbe disease（99.8%）</li>
<li>metachromatic leukodystrophy（99.8%）</li>
<li>Wolman disease with hypolipoproteinemia and acanthocytosis（99.8%）</li>
<li>encephalopathy due to prosaposin deficiency（99.8%）</li>
<li>Tay-Sachs disease（99.8%）</li>
<li>benign neoplasm of adrenal gland（99.7%）</li>
<li>recessive X-linked ichthyosis（99.7%）</li>
<li>fatty acid hydroxylase-associated neurodegeneration（99.7%）</li>
<li>lysosomal acid lipase deficiency（99.7%）</li>
<li>cholesterol metabolism disease（99.7%）</li>
<li>adult Krabbe disease（99.7%）</li>
<li>polycystic kidney disease 3 with or without polycystic liver disease（99.7%）</li>
<li>long chain 3-hydroxyacyl-CoA dehydrogenase deficiency（99.7%）</li>
<li>multiple mitochondrial dysfunctions syndrome（99.6%）</li>
<li>cerebrotendinous xanthomatosis（99.6%）</li>
<li>Dorfman-Chanarin disease（99.6%）</li>
<li>fatty acyl-CoA reductase 1 deficiency（99.6%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/miglustat/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
